message:
feat(service): unify NotReady error variant across all service middlewares

Standardize readiness contract enforcement across ConcurrencyLimit,
RateLimit, Timeout, and TowerAdapter with a consistent NotReady error
variant that fires when call() is invoked without a preceding poll_ready().

ConcurrencyLimit: Replace LimitExceeded with NotReady for readiness
misuse (LimitExceeded is preserved for actual capacity exhaustion).
New queued_acquire_survives_call_misuse test verifies in-flight permit
acquisition state is preserved across misuse attempts.

RateLimit: Replace RateLimitExceeded with NotReady for zero-reservation
calls. Updated error display, debug, source, and all affected tests.

Timeout: Major refactor — TimeoutFuture now uses an explicit state machine
(NotReady -> Running -> Done) instead of bare fields, preventing use-after-
completion bugs. New PolledAfterCompletion variant catches double-poll.
Clone explicitly resets ready_observed to false. New tests:
call_without_poll_ready, readiness_authorizes_only_one_call.

TowerAdapter (service.rs): Compute timeout_deadline once before acquiring
the inner service lock, then reuse it for both readiness waiting and the
request future. This ensures the total time budget (readiness + execution)
stays within the configured fallback_timeout. New test_cx_with_timer()
helper and timeout_fallback_times_out_while_waiting_for_ready test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
